subject: [PATCH v4 3/3] cxl/core: use cleanup.h for devm_cxl_add_dax_region

2026-03-22.patch_summary: This patch updates the function devm_cxl_add_dax_region to use cleanup.h for device management, replacing goto statements with more modern and efficient error handling using macros from cleanup.h. This change does not introduce any functional changes but improves code quality by reducing the use of gotos.
